<!-- Thanks for contributing to Inkwell! A few short prompts so maintainers can review fast. -->

## What this PR does

<!-- One or two sentences — the *why*, not a diff summary. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- Closes #N — or write "standalone" if this is a tiny fix. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New scanner (platform integration)
- [ ] New exporter (output integration)
- [ ] Persona template
- [ ] Feature / enhancement
- [ ] Docs / polish
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Screenshots / recording

<!-- If this touches the web UI, please drop a screenshot or short clip.
     For CLI or API changes, a paste of the command output is fine. -->

## Test plan

- [ ] `pytest` passes green
- [ ] `ruff check inkwell/` passes
- [ ] Manually ran `python -m inkwell serve` and clicked through the affected flow
- [ ] Added / updated tests for the new behavior

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing style (`ruff format`)
- [ ] No new deps unless necessary; if added, flagged in the description
- [ ] Docs updated (README / CONTRIBUTING / inline) if the change is user-facing
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal data in commits
